docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY WALLIS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WALLIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY LINDA ROE, REGIONAL SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES NOTICE OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALLIS, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLIS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION
